skill.p1nero_ec.astrape.desc1: Press %s to release an enhanced torrent forward, generating lightning strikes along the path and summoning Thunderfall Canglings, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.astrape.desc2: Press %s to summon extremely wide-range lightning strikes and numerous Thunderfall Canglings at the target location, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.ceraunus.desc1: Press %s to throw %s forward, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.ceraunus.desc2: Press %s to summon a sector-shaped wave forward, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.ceraunus.desc3: Press %s to leap forward, release lightning in all directions, and summon waves, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.desc: §6Perfect Dodge§7 or §6Perfect Parry§7 to gain Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.dual_annihilator.desc1: Press %s to smash the ground forward with full force, summoning multi-directional AXE BLADE attacks, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.dual_annihilator.desc2: Press %s to perform a powerful upward slash forward, summoning wide-range claw-shaped AXE BLADE attacks, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.gauntlet_of_guard.desc2: Press %s to unleash rapid consecutive strikes forward while summoning void runes, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.gauntlet_of_guard.desc3: Press %s to leap forward and smash the ground with full force, summoning wide-range void runes and generating abyssal lasers, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.infernal_forge.desc1: Press %s to swing the great hammer forward continuously, the final strike detonating lava energy, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.infernal_forge.desc2: Press %s to launch bombardment in front, igniting creatures ahead and dealing massive damage, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.infernal_forge.desc3: Press %s to leap forward and smash the ground with full force, erupting extreme lava energy for wide-range bombardment, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.soul_render.desc1: Press %s to dash forward, leaving phantom halberds along the path, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.soul_render.desc2: Press %s to slam the ground with force, dealing heavy damage and inflicting stun to surrounding entities, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.soul_render.desc3: Press %s to summon numerous phantom halberds around you, consuming %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.the_incinerator.desc2: Press %s to charge up and fire five fireballs forward, consumes %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.the_incinerator.desc3: Press %s to release the [Flame Soul Slash] forward, consumes %d Skill Points
skill.p1nero_ec.tidal_claw.desc2: Press %s to charge forward and launch %s, consuming %d skill points
skill.p1nero_ec.tidal_claw.desc3: Press %s to create %s at the feet of entities within a 10-meter radius, consuming %d skill points
skill.p1nero_ec.wrath_of_the_desert.desc: Press %s to shoot three sandstorm forward, consuming %d Skill Points
Press %s to shoot three cursed sandstorm forward, consuming %d Skill Points
Press %s to summon 3 sandstorm, then summon Ancient Desert Steles to crash down around you, consuming %d Skill Points
